name: Scales of the Edenkite
additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that lasts 5 seconds with a 3 minute cooldown. The deaggro effect only works in PvE, and is extremely ineffective, as most enemies will immediately reaggro. The deaggro effect does not work against bosses or in Depths Trials.
desc: In order to resolve conflict in Lumen, you need to be able to handle any situation thrown at you. Activate your Scales to reduce all damage taken by 80% and de-aggro enemies briefly.
